chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constt:Petition No.S-275 of 2024. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on M.A.No.585/2024 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection as flag A. 3. For orders on M.A.No.586/2024 (E/A). 4. For the hearing of the main case. 25.7.2024. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the applicant. =.=.=.=.=.= 1. Urgency granted. 2. Over-ruled. 3. Deferred. 4. The protection which the petitioner has sought from this Court by way of the instant petition, has already been granted to him by learned Sessions Judge/Ex-officio Justice of Peace, Kashmore @ Kandhkot, vide order dated 27.06.2024. No further order on the same cause by this Court by way of the instant petition is appearing to be justified; consequently, it is dismissed in limine. JUDG
